headline: AMCR Enhances Sauce Packaging With Next-Gen Flip Top Closure Launch
summary: Amcor rolls out a lighter Flava Flip Top Closure, cutting weight by 18.7% to help brands hit sustainability goals while expanding sauce packaging options.
